summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HazMat Substances API (Appendix A/B data) with 1804 entries. All 12 backend API tests passed. All 4 frontend UI tests passed. The new dataset correctly replaces the previous ~300 entry hardcoded data.
passed_tests: GET /api/hazmat-substances/search?q=benzene returns multiple results with RQ values
GET /api/hazmat-substances/search?q=gasoline returns 'Gasoline, leaded' with rq_lbs=null, is_marine_pollutant=true
GET /api/hazmat-substances/search?q=D001 returns waste stream entry with RQ=100
GET /api/hazmat-substances/search?q=xylene returns multiple isomers with correct RQ values
No MongoDB _id field in any API response
Frontend: HazMat Worksheet page loads at /hazmat-worksheet
Frontend: Tools tab accessible with RQ & Marine Pollutant Lookup component
Frontend: Chlorine search displays RQ badge (10 lbs) and Marine Pollutant badge
Frontend: Aldrin search displays RQ badge (1 lbs) and Severe Marine Pollutant (PP) badge
Frontend: Gasoline search displays 'Not a Hazardous Substance' and 'Marine Pollutant' badges
Backend startup logs show 'Seeded 1804 hazmat substances from JSON'
critical_code_review_comments: Re-seeding logic (count < 1000) ensures data is updated when JSON file changes
MongoDB _id properly excluded from API response with {'_id': 0} projection
Search uses regex on name field with case-insensitive matching
Results limited to 20 entries per search
Frontend SubstanceLookup component has proper debounce (300ms) for search
All data-testid attributes present for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: HazMat Substances API fully tested. Key endpoint: GET /api/hazmat-substances/search?q={query}. Returns array of objects with fields: name, name_lower, rq_lbs (null if not hazardous substance), is_hazardous_substance, is_marine_pollutant, is_severe_marine_pollutant. Frontend component: SubstanceLookup in HazMatHelpers.js, accessible via Tools tab on /hazmat-worksheet page. Data-testids: substance-lookup, substance-lookup-toggle, substance-search-input, substance-result-{n}. Dataset has 1804 entries from 49 CFR 172.101 Appendix A (Hazardous Substances/RQ) and Appendix B (Marine Pollutants).
